title: Despite downward revision in nominal GDP, India's fiscal dynamics remain comfortable: UBI Report
description: India GDP revision: In absolute terms, India's fiscal deficit for April-January FY26 stood at Rs 9.81 lakh crore, or 63 per cent of the revised estimates, compared to Rs 11.70 lakh crore, or 74.5 per cent of the RE, in the corresponding period last year.
